text: No person shall leave standing a locked vehicle in which there is any person who cannot readily escape therefrom.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 9. Stopping, Standing, and Parking [22500 - 22526]
##### § 22516

No person shall leave standing a locked vehicle in which there is any person who cannot readily escape therefrom.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: No person shall leave standing a locked vehicle in which there is any person who cannot readily escape therefrom.
